GitHub Issues is this repo's only tactical queue (see AGENTS.md). If this PR
resolves a tracked issue, close it FROM the PR so the queue stays accurate:

An epic closed slice-by-slice: put `Closes #NNN` on the PR that lands the LAST
slice; earlier slices use `Refs #NNN`.
